import React,{useEffect}from'react';import{useState}from'react';import'../../styles/Main.css';import logo from'../../assets/logo.png';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useSearchParams}from'react-router-dom';import NavBar from'../../components/NavBar';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function CaregiverHome(){const navigate=useNavigate();const[searchParams]=useSearchParams();const id=searchParams.get('id');const[patients,setPatients]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const patientColors=['#cee7f4','#9ed4f8','#7abcef','#52adf7','#2f95f5'];useEffect(()=>{async function getPatients(){try{const response=await fetch("/get-patients?caregiverID=".concat(id),{method:'GET',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});const data=await response.json();setPatients(data.patients);}catch(err){console.error('Error fetching patients:',err);return[];}finally{setLoading(false);}}getPatients();console.log(patients);},[id]);//change once id changes
